## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `cd aiops && python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Screenshots or UI verification included when UI changed

## Risk

- [ ] Low: isolated change
- [ ] Medium: shared surface changed
- [ ] High: auth, incident flow, remediation, persistence, or deployment behavior changed

## Release Notes

- User-visible impact:
- Ops / migration impact:
- Follow-up work:
